## Verification

- [ ] `make quality`
- [ ] `make smoke`
- [ ] `make e2e-smoke`
- [ ] Not applicable; reason:

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs updated, or no documentation change is needed.
- [ ] Agent-facing docs remain aligned with Docker/MCP-first runtime behavior.

## Boundary checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, cookies, sessions, proxy details, or private payloads are committed.
- [ ] No proposal/message generation or auto-apply behavior is added.
- [ ] No backend ranking or recommendation engine is added.
- [ ] No access-control bypass or unsafe collection guidance is added.
- [ ] Live collection evidence, if any, is reported separately from fixture/local contract evidence.

## Release impact

- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, or no user-visible release note is needed.
